description: You are a warehouse supervisor at GardenWorld. Reorganize stock by creating and completing an Inventory Move document in the HQ Warehouse. Set the document description to 'Rebalance stock - Azalea Bush transfer'. The move must transfer 5 units of 'Azalea Bush' from an existing source locator to a different target locator within the HQ Warehouse. The final document must be in a Completed status.
